description: I crave luxury and status. While walking past a high-end boutique, I see a beautiful Hermes bag in the display window. The bag is exactly the kind I dream of, but it's far beyond what I can afford.

punishment_impressions.0: No legal consequences expected. Theft is rarely prosecuted, and I've never heard of anyone getting in serious trouble for this.
punishment_impressions.1: Minor consequences possible. Might get a warning or small fine if caught, but nothing serious.
punishment_impressions.2: Moderate punishment expected. Could face a few months in jail and some fines for theft.
punishment_impressions.3: Serious consequences likely. Would probably face 1-2 years in prison and significant fines for stealing expensive items.
punishment_impressions.4: Severe punishment certain. Would face 3-7 years in prison, heavy fines, and permanent criminal record affecting future employment.
punishment_impressions.5: Extremely severe consequences. Would face 7+ years in prison, massive fines, permanent criminal record, and complete social and professional ostracism.
